engineering.translation: Shutting out external contacts (sparśān bahir kṛtvā), fixing the gaze between the eyebrows (cakṣuḥ bhruvor antare kṛtvā), equalising the in-and-out breaths within the nostrils (prāṇa-apānau samau kṛtvā nāsā-abhyantara-cāriṇau). [continues at 5.28]. The verse contains explicit somatic yoga instructions. STRETCHED honestly. There is an operational shadow — deliberate attention rituals at the work-rhythm level — but the verse names a literal physical posture, not a metaphor. The engineering analog: the senior who has built explicit attention rituals (deep-work blocks scheduled on the calendar, do-not-disturb windows enforced, dedicated reading hours protected, the Slack-off-after-7pm rule). Who treats these rituals as somatic-procedural rather than aspirational. The passage's gaze-fixing and breath-equalising are not the engg layer; the discipline of building procedural attention rituals is.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A principal engineer's calendar across a quarter. Every Tuesday and Thursday from 9 AM to noon: deep-work block, Slack notifications off, calendar blocked as 'do-not-disturb', phone in another room. Every Friday from 4 PM to 5 PM: explicit incident-retrospective walk, no laptop. Every weekday at 7 PM: Slack closed for the night, regardless of message volume. These are her engineering equivalents of the verse's somatic yoga: procedural attention rituals built at the work-rhythm level. STRETCHED honestly. The verse names literal gaze-fixing-between-the-eyebrows and breath-equalising-in-the-nostrils; the engg analog scopes to the procedural rituals that produce focus-discipline at the meta-level. The passage's reach (literal somatic preparation for samādhi) exceeds the operational analog. Tools named: GitHub Calendar, Slack, the laptop, Datadog notifications.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears the verse as endorsing literal yoga as engineering practice. The verse is yoga instruction; chapter 6 is its full elaboration. The engineering analog is the procedural-attention-rituals shadow at the work-rhythm level — explicitly bounded, explicitly STRETCHED.
engineering.counter_example: When the procedural rituals are performative — calendar-blocked but Slack-checked, laptop-closed but phone-active — the verse's discipline is not honored. The somatic-procedural integrity (the rituals actually hold) is the structural condition.
engineering.implication: Audit whether your attention rituals are procedural-real or performative. The verse names somatic integrity; the engineering analog requires the rituals to actually hold.
engineering.quotable_line: Attention rituals at the work-rhythm level: real if procedural, performative if not. STRETCHED honestly.

Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
